data.content: The project uses **MSTest v3** with the Microsoft Testing Platform enabled. Tests are categorized via `[TestCategory]`. I'll run only the "Integration" tests:

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests filtered by category

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests filtered by category

data.reasoningText:
The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0) with the Microsoft Testing Platform (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` is set to `true` in Directory.Build.props). The tests have categories "Unit" and "Integration", and the user wants only the integration tests.

With MSTest v3 and the testing platform, to filter by category I can use `--filter "TestCategory=Integration"`.

arguments.description: Run integration tests filtered by category

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-f481b8bf699948febd1dbd13e8539a84 && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests filtered by category", "initial_wait": 60}

toolArgs.description: Run integration tests filtered by category

data.content:
All done! The project uses **MSTest v3** with the **Microsoft Testing Platform** (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`). The integration test (`GetAll_QueriesDatabase`) passed successfully using:

```
dotnet test --filter "TestCategory=Integration"
```
